name: Cheesy Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium pot, combine the nutritional yeast and flour.
2. Place over low heat and stir until lightly toasted.
3. Add oil, stirring to create a thick batter.
4. Slowly add water, stirring constantly until the desired consistency is reached (you can use as little as 1 cup or as much as 2 cups).
5. Add garlic powder, paprika, basil, oregano, and tamari.
6. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
7. Yields approximately 2 cups.
